seo.title: Events API - Upcoming JKT48 Events & Performances
seo.description: Access upcoming JKT48 events and performances including handshake events, concerts, off-air shows, and special appearances. Perfect for event calendars, concert reminders, and fan schedule apps.

hero.heading: What's coming up for JKT48?
hero.subheading: Access upcoming JKT48 events and performances — handshake events, concerts, off-air shows, and special appearances. Build event calendars, concert reminders, and fan schedule apps with real JKT48 event data.

definition.title: What is the Events API?
definition.text:
The Events API provides structured data for JKT48 events and performances — everything from handshake sessions and fan meet-and-greets to concerts, TV appearances, and special off-air shows.

Instead of scraping social media announcements or manually tracking event posts, the Events API aggregates officially announced JKT48 events into a consistent, queryable format.

Each event in the response includes:

- **Event type** — handshake, concert, off-air show, TV appearance, fan event, or special performance
- **Event name & description** — the official event title and details as announced
- **Date & time** — start date, time, and duration where available
- **Location** — venue name, city, and address for in-person events
- **Participating members** — which members are participating in the event where specified
- **Ticket & registration info** — links to ticket sales or registration pages where available
- **Status** — upcoming, ongoing, completed, or cancelled

The Events API covers both upcoming events (for calendars and reminders) and past events (for historical activity pages and analytics). Use it to build anything from a simple upcoming events widget to a full fan event calendar with member-specific filtering.

capabilities_section.title: What you can do with the Events API
capabilities_section.intro: Build event calendars, reminder systems, and fan schedule tools with structured JKT48 event data.

capabilities.title: Upcoming event feed
capabilities.description: Query all upcoming JKT48 events sorted by date. Filter by event type, member, or date range to get exactly the events relevant to your app.

capabilities.title: Event type filtering
capabilities.description: Filter by event type — handshake, concert, off-air, TV appearance, or fan event. Build type-specific views like a handshake calendar or a concerts-only schedule.

capabilities.title: Member-specific events
capabilities.description: Query events filtered by member participation. Show fans which upcoming events feature their oshi — from handshake slots to special appearances.

capabilities.title: Past event history
capabilities.description: Access historical event data for building activity timelines, analytics dashboards, and member appearance history pages.

capabilities.title: Ticket & registration links
capabilities.description: Each event record includes ticket purchase or registration links where available — ready to surface to fans in your app without manual link tracking.

capabilities.title: Event status tracking
capabilities.description: Events are tagged with their current status — upcoming, ongoing, completed, or cancelled. Build dynamic UIs that reflect real event states.

how_it_works.title: How the Events API works
how_it_works.intro: Query upcoming events, filter by type or member, and display structured event data in your app.

steps.title: Query upcoming events
steps.description: Call GET /v1/events with optional query parameters for type, member_id, or date range. By default returns all upcoming events sorted by start date.

steps.title: Filter by type or member
steps.description: Pass type=handshake to get only handshake events, or member_id to get events featuring a specific member. Combine filters for precise results.

steps.title: Get event detail
steps.description: Call GET /v1/events/:event_id to retrieve full detail for a specific event — complete description, all participating members, venue info, and ticket links.

steps.title: Display in your app
steps.description: Render event calendars, upcoming event lists, countdown timers, or push notification triggers based on the structured event data returned.

use_cases.title: Who uses the Events API
use_cases.intro: Fan developers building event-focused JKT48 tools and schedule applications.

items.title: Event calendars & schedules
items.description: Build a comprehensive JKT48 event calendar that fans can filter by event type, month, or member. Display upcoming handshake slots, concerts, and special appearances in one place.

items.title: Concert & event reminders
items.description: Build reminder apps that notify fans before JKT48 events they care about — with push notifications, Discord alerts, or email reminders triggered by upcoming event data.

items.title: Oshi event trackers
items.description: Let fans follow specific members and see only the events their oshi is participating in — upcoming handshake slots, TV appearances, and fan meet-and-greet sessions.

items.title: Fan community bots
items.description: Build Discord or Telegram bots that automatically announce upcoming JKT48 events to fan communities — concerts, handshake registration opens, and special appearances.

related_features.title: Members
related_features.description: Events reference member records. Use the Members API to enrich event participant data with full profiles and photos.

related_features.title: Member Detail
related_features.description: Member Detail includes upcoming event appearances alongside streaming stats and theater schedules — for complete member profile pages.

related_features.title: Theater Schedule
related_features.description: Theater shows are tracked separately from events. Use the Theater Schedule endpoint for regular show data and the Events API for special appearances.

related_features.title: Birthday
related_features.description: Cross-reference events with birthday data to highlight when a member performs on or near their birthday.

faqs.title: Frequently asked questions
faqs.intro: Common questions about the JKT48Connect Events API.

items.question: What types of events are covered?
items.answer: The Events API covers handshake sessions, fan meet-and-greets, concerts, off-air shows, TV appearances, and special performances. Events are tagged with a type field so you can filter by the category you need.

items.question: How quickly are new events added after announcement?
items.answer: The JKT48Connect team monitors official JKT48 channels and adds events as quickly as possible after they are officially announced. Most events appear within hours of the official announcement.

items.question: Does the API include past events?
items.answer: Yes. Past events are retained with a status of 'completed'. Query past events by passing a date range that includes past dates, or use the status=completed filter to retrieve historical event data.

items.question: Can I filter events by a specific member?
items.answer: Yes. Pass member_id as a query parameter to retrieve only events that include that member in the participants list. Note that not all event types specify individual participating members — handshake events typically do, while general concerts may not.

items.question: Are cancelled events included in the response?
items.answer: Yes. Cancelled events are retained with a status of 'cancelled' so your app can display cancellation notices to fans rather than silently removing events. Filter them out with status=upcoming if you only want active events.

items.question: Does the API include ticket purchase links?
items.answer: Yes, where available. The ticket_url field is populated when official ticket sale links have been announced. Not all events have ticketing links — fan events and TV appearances typically do not require tickets.
